---
title: "Practical Tools"
---

## Teaching Materials

- **SOEP with R Cheat Slides**  
  Some slides I prepared to ease the use of SOEP with R. [[Slides]](slides/SOEPinR.html#1)

## Code

- **R Shiny Code for a Panel Survey Dashboard**  
  Full replication code for a [scientific dashboard](https://woco.univie.ac.at/dashboard/) ready to be applied to most panel surveys with a few little tweaks. [[GitHub]](https://github.com/fabiankal/woco)

- **Data Visualization with Isotypes using Quarto \&  Vega-Lite**  
  Example plot on the inequality in [CO2 Footprints](https://data-science.wifo.ac.at/emissionen-ungleichheit), compiled in cooperation with Lukas Schmoigl.
  Full replication code on [[GitHub]](https://github.com/fabiankal/woco).
